name: The Lamb the Ichor's Vessel
description:
The Last of their kind. The Vessel of the One Who Waits. The New God of Death. Titles all given to the Lamb who leads the new Faith. Once a sacrifice to the four great bishops. The Lamb now has overtaken them in rank after many long crusades. Now with a ever growing community of followers that they saved, and those that they have forgiven. The Lamb tries to make a better future for those who follow them even as they struggle with their new divinity.

Character is owned by Massive Monster. Alternate Universe and art of Ichor's Vessel is owned by the amazing Aveloka Draws. I think their take on the lamb is one of the coolest so far. The whole Macabre idea of slowly becoming an eldritch god after you go through a horrifying execution yet still retaining the will to forgive and to protect is such an awesome idea that hits all the right boxes for me.
creator: Zomdork
